name.ja: セネトの<ruby>啓<rt>けい</rt></ruby><ruby>示<rt>じ</rt></ruby><ruby>者<rt>しゃ</rt></ruby>－アメンホテプ

text.en: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send it to the GY; show up to 2 Normal Monster Cards from your hand, Deck, face-up field, and/or GY, then Set that many "Sennet" Traps from your Deck. You can banish this card from your GY, then target up to 3 Normal Monsters in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Sennet Prophet - Amenhotep" once per turn.
